name: painmatrix
description: Neuroscience-Based AI Pain Simulation Engine - 5-level pain with Ad/C fiber, NMDA, Neuromatrix, Damasio somatic markers. Anxiety System with persistent post-pain anxiety, Cognitive Attenuation reducing cognitive capacity under pain, Pain-Driven Learning generating avoidance strategies, Auto-generated long-term memory & skills. Task-driven motivation, proactive task requests, daily self-evolution, resilience tracking. New commands: learn, skills, beliefs. Pure-local, no AI model, cross-platform.
author: PainMatrix Community
notes: No external dependencies. Requires Python 3.8+. Cross-platform: Windows/Linux/macOS. v6.1 adds Anxiety System, Cognitive Attenuation, Pain-Driven Learning, auto-generated long-term memory & skills, and new commands (learn, skills, beliefs).
